title: The Bell of Brightwater
lesson: Bravery grows when we listen, learn, and help others together.
prompts: In a medieval village square at dawn -- timber cottages, a stone well, muddy paths, pale golden light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image carries a small basket of bread past the stone well, looking curious and alert. Eye-level medium shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a medieval village square at dawn -- timber cottages, a stone well, muddy paths, pale golden light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image grips the bread basket with both hands and turns toward the worried villagers, with a startled expression. {ADVENTURE_ELDER_MARA} raises one trembling hand toward the chapel bell rope, looking afraid. {ADVENTURE_BLACKSMITH_TOMAS} leans over the well bucket, pressing a cloth to his forehead with a weary expression. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

Inside a medieval healer's cottage in the morning -- hanging herbs, wooden shelves of clay jars, a small hearth, warm amber light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image points at an open herb book on the table, with a determined expression. {ADVENTURE_HEALER_ALDEN} holds a clay cup and traces a drawing in the book with one finger, looking grave. Make the interaction read physically: both faces and hands aim toward the same open book. Eye-level medium shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

Inside a medieval healer's cottage in the morning -- hanging herbs, wooden shelves of clay jars, a small hearth, warm amber light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image kneels beside a straw bed, offering a damp cloth with a careful expression. {ADVENTURE_SICK_CHILD_ELIN} lies propped on pillows under a patched blanket, holding the cloth weakly and looking feverish. {ADVENTURE_HEALER_ALDEN} mixes herbs in a wooden bowl, watching with concern. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

At a medieval village gate at morning -- tall wooden palisade, open cart track, misty forest beyond, cool silver light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image fastens a small satchel across their chest and holds up the herb book, with a brave expression. {ADVENTURE_GATE_GUARD_ROWAN} lifts the heavy gate bar with both hands, looking cautious. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In an ancient forest in late morning -- mossy stones, twisted oak roots, ferns, shafts of green light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image crouches beside a fallen log, brushing leaves away from a tiny silver leaf plant, with a focused expression. Eye-level medium shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In an ancient forest in late morning -- mossy stones, twisted oak roots, ferns, shafts of green light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image reaches one hand toward the tiny silver leaf plant while using the other hand to steady the herb book, with an amazed expression. A small fox made of warm golden light stands on a mossy stone and points its nose toward the plant, looking watchful. Eye-level medium shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

At a medieval village gate at morning -- tall wooden palisade, open cart track, misty forest beyond, cool silver light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image runs through the open gate clutching a wrapped silver leaf plant, with an urgent hopeful expression. {ADVENTURE_GATE_GUARD_ROWAN} pulls the gate wider with both hands and turns toward the runner, looking relieved. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

Inside a medieval healer's cottage in the morning -- hanging herbs, wooden shelves of clay jars, a small hearth, warm amber light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image tips the silver leaf plant into a steaming mortar, with a careful concentrated expression. {ADVENTURE_HEALER_ALDEN} grinds the leaves with a wooden pestle, looking intent. {ADVENTURE_ELDER_MARA} steadies a row of clay cups on the table, looking hopeful. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a medieval village square at dawn -- timber cottages, a stone well, muddy paths, pale golden light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image carries a tray of small clay cups toward waiting villagers, with a gentle determined expression. {ADVENTURE_BLACKSMITH_TOMAS} kneels to receive one cup with both hands, looking grateful and exhausted. {ADVENTURE_ELDER_MARA} guides his elbow, looking hopeful. Make the handoff read as one shared cup between the child and blacksmith. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

Inside a medieval healer's cottage in the morning -- hanging herbs, wooden shelves of clay jars, a small hearth, warm amber light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image sits beside the straw bed and clasps the sick child's hand, with a relieved expression. {ADVENTURE_SICK_CHILD_ELIN} sits upright holding a clay cup and smiling weakly. {ADVENTURE_HEALER_ALDEN} checks the child's forehead with the back of his hand, looking relieved. Eye-level medium shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}

In a medieval village square at dawn -- timber cottages, a stone well, muddy paths, pale golden light -- the {INPUT_1_AGE} person from the input image rings the chapel bell rope with both hands, smiling proudly. {ADVENTURE_ELDER_MARA} lifts a small wreath toward the child, looking grateful. {ADVENTURE_BLACKSMITH_TOMAS} claps with broad hands, looking healthy and joyful. {ADVENTURE_HEALER_ALDEN} raises the herb book in celebration, looking proud. Eye-level medium-wide shot, soft storybook illustration style. {INPUT_IMAGE_IDENTITY}
gists: In a medieval village square at dawn, the child carries bread past the well, showing the peaceful village before trouble begins.
In the village square, the child turns in alarm as the elder reaches for the bell and the blacksmith leans sickly near the well.
Inside the healer's cottage, the child points to an herb book while the healer explains that a rare silver leaf may cure the sickness.
Inside the healer's cottage, the child comforts a sick village child while the healer prepares simple herbs that are not strong enough yet.
At the village gate, the child prepares to leave for the forest while the gate guard opens the way with caution.
In the ancient forest, the child searches near a fallen log and discovers a tiny silver leaf plant among the ferns.
In the ancient forest, the child reaches for the silver leaf as a magical golden fox quietly guides them to the right plant.
At the village gate, the child runs home carrying the wrapped silver leaf while the relieved guard opens the gate wider.
Inside the healer's cottage, the child, healer, and elder work together to grind the silver leaf and pour medicine into clay cups.
In the village square, the child gives medicine to the sick blacksmith while the elder helps, showing the village beginning to hope.
Inside the healer's cottage, the sick child sits up after drinking medicine while the child and healer react with relief.
In the village square, the child rings the chapel bell as the elder, blacksmith, and healer celebrate the village being saved.
texts: At dawn, {NAME} carried warm bread through Brightwater village. The well splashed softly, and smoke curled from little roofs. "Good morning, village," said {NAME}, smiling at the sleepy square.
Then the chapel bell clanged. Elder Mara cried, "The fever has spread!" Blacksmith Tomas groaned by the well. "What can I do?" asked {NAME}. "Find Healer Alden," said Mara.
In the healer's cottage, Alden opened a dusty book. "Only silver leaf can cool this fever," he said. {NAME} pointed to the picture. "Then I will find it," said {NAME}.
Little Elin shivered on a straw bed. {NAME} pressed a cool cloth to her hand. "Will I get better?" whispered Elin. "We will try," said {NAME}. Alden nodded, worried but ready.
At the gate, Rowan lifted the heavy bar. "The forest is deep," warned Rowan. "I will be careful," said {NAME}, holding the herb book tight. "Then hurry," Rowan said.
Under twisted oaks, {NAME} searched beside mossy stones. Leaves rustled, and every fern looked mysterious. "Silver leaf, silver leaf," whispered {NAME}. "Please be hiding close by."
A golden fox stepped onto a stone, bright as candlelight. It tipped its nose toward a tiny plant. "Is that it?" asked {NAME}. The fox blinked. "Thank you," said {NAME}.
{NAME} raced back through the gate with the plant wrapped safely. "You found it!" called Rowan, pulling the gate wide. "The village still has time," panted {NAME}.
Alden crushed the silver leaf while Mara lined up cups. {NAME} poured carefully. "Slowly," said Alden. "No drops wasted," said Mara. "For everyone," said {NAME}.
In the square, {NAME} carried the first cup to Tomas. "Drink this," said {NAME}. "For Brightwater?" asked Tomas weakly. "For all of us," said Mara, steadying his hand.
By evening, Elin sat up and sipped. "My head feels cool," she whispered. {NAME} squeezed her hand. "You are getting better," said Alden. {NAME} finally smiled.
When the bell rang again, it rang for joy. Mara placed a wreath in {NAME}'s hands. "You listened, learned, and helped," she said. Brightwater cheered, and {NAME}'s bravery shone.
